output_text: A 7-year-old British schoolgirl, India Mayhew, has died after being thrown from a horse while on holiday in India with her family. The incident occurred at a riding facility in Matheran, 20 miles east of Mumbai, where India was riding just ahead of her father and a staff member when the horse bolted. Despite efforts to control the horse and rush India to a nearby health center, she suffered serious head injuries and was declared dead on arrival at the hospital. The police have registered a case of accidental death, and the family has chosen not to press charges against the operator.
